name: OxyGenX Pod Set – GLAM POD
shortDescription: Anti-aging and collagen-boosting OxyGenX pod set. 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. Prevents and reduces early signs of aging.
description:
The GLAM POD set is an anti-aging treatment package developed for the OxyGenX+ treatment device, which prevents and reduces early signs of aging, boosts collagen production, and soothes the skin.

The set contains 6 OxyGenX capsules (pods), 6 primer gels, and 6 serums – sufficient for 6 complete treatments.

During the treatment, the released CO₂ stimulates the skin's natural oxygen production (Bohr effect), while the special active ingredients deeply nourish and firm the skin.
metaTitle: OxyGenX GLAM POD set – anti-aging treatment package
metaDescription: GLAM POD set for OxyGenX+ device: 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. Anti-aging, collagen stimulation, skin firming. 12.990 Ft.

faq.question: How many treatments does a GLAM POD set last?
faq.answer: One set is sufficient for 6 complete treatments. It contains 6 capsules, 6 primer gels, and 6 serums.

faq.question: What skin type is the GLAM POD recommended for?
faq.answer: The GLAM POD is primarily recommended for mature skin, for preventing and reducing early signs of aging. It boosts collagen production and firms the skin.

faq.question: Which device is the GLAM POD set compatible with?
faq.answer: The GLAM POD set is designed for the OxyGenX+ device's oxy-pod applicator. It is also compatible with the HydraScan PRO+ 2026 oxy-pod applicator.
